author: zlxi
name: LeakyMixer
blurb: 11-layer leaky_relu(0.5)^2 with warmdown 3500, eval-time backoff n-gram mixer for BPB boost. trained on 4xA100 SXM (849 steps in 600s), should get more steps on 8xH100.
notes: 4xA100 run (849 steps). 8xH100 should reach ~1700 steps and ~1.20 BPB neural-only. n-gram mixer at eval drops BPB by ~0.45-0.50 on top of that.
